title: Paler Gardens
description: A Subjective Reinterpretation Of Minecraft's Latest Biome
body:
Resource pack which aims to change what (in my opinion) is possibly mojang's greatest fumble (in terms of spritework):

The Pale Garden!

this resource pack (will eventually) change(s) everything relating to the pale garden, including:
- every single resin related item
- eyeblossoms and creaking related stuff
- pale oak woodset
- and a lot more! 

Check out the gallery to see what's changed <3

if you have any suggestions or want to harass me to finish this already, join the discord!
